recipes.title: Spinach and Lemon Chicken
recipes.summary: Pan-seared chicken over baby spinach with citrus herbs and quinoa.
instructions: Season chicken with lemon zest, salt, pepper, and a little olive oil.
Sear the chicken until golden and cooked through.
Toss spinach with warm quinoa and lemon juice.
Slice chicken and serve over the greens.

recipes.title: Quinoa Power Bowl
recipes.summary: A balanced bowl with roasted vegetables, chickpeas, greens, and tahini.
instructions: Roast diced sweet potato until tender.
Warm chickpeas with paprika and garlic.
Layer quinoa, greens, chickpeas, and sweet potato.
Drizzle with tahini lemon dressing.

recipes.title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
recipes.summary: Creamy yogurt layered with berries, oats, and honey.
instructions: Spoon yogurt into a bowl or jar.
Layer berries, oats, and chia seeds.
Finish with honey and chill until ready.

recipes.title: Grilled Salmon and Asparagus
recipes.summary: A clean dinner plate with salmon, asparagus, lemon, and herbed rice.
instructions: Brush salmon with olive oil, lemon, and dill.
Grill salmon skin-side down until flaky.
Char asparagus beside the fish.
Serve with herbed rice and lemon.

recipes.title: Lentil Tomato Soup
recipes.summary: A warm pantry-friendly soup with lentils, tomatoes, carrot, and herbs.
instructions: Soften onion and carrot in olive oil.
Add lentils, tomato, and stock.
Simmer until lentils are tender.
Blend lightly and finish with parsley.

recipes.title: Avocado Egg Sourdough
recipes.summary: Toasted sourdough with avocado, soft egg, chili flakes, and greens.
instructions: Toast sourdough until crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon and salt.
Cook egg to preference.
Assemble with greens and chili flakes.

recipes.title: Tofu Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.summary: Crisp tofu with vegetables, ginger, garlic, and a light soy glaze.
instructions: Press and cube tofu.
Sear tofu until crisp on all sides.
Stir fry vegetables with ginger and garlic.
Toss everything with soy glaze.

recipes.title: Berry Almond Snack Plate
recipes.summary: Berries with almonds, dark chocolate, and a spoon of yogurt.
instructions: Rinse berries and place on a plate.
Add almonds and dark chocolate pieces.
Serve with a small spoon of yogurt.

recipes.title: Chicken Breast Lemon Herb Bowl with Spinach
recipes.summary: Chicken Breast, quinoa, and spinach composed as a lemon herb bowl for a practical snack.
instructions: Prepare the quinoa until tender and season lightly.
Cook the chicken breast with herbs, lemon, and a small amount of olive oil.
Add spinach and fold everything into the lemon herb bowl format.
Taste, adjust seasoning, and portion for the current calorie target.
